title: loxanthocereus hoxeyi subsp. hoxeyi
intro: Loxanthocereus hoxeyi subsp. hoxeyi is a cactus species that belongs to the Cactaceae family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of alkaloids and other compounds. The health benefits associated with Loxanthocereus hoxeyi subsp. hoxeyi include wound healing, pain relief, and antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying the stems and leaves, and then infusing them in water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or topical applications.
